title: ipomoea mollissima
intro: Ipomoea mollissima, also known as the Sweet Potato Morning Glory, is a perennial vine native to China, characterized by its heart-shaped leaves and trumpet-shaped flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat digestive issues and relieve symptoms of fever. The health benefits of Ipomoea mollissima include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and providing antioxidant properties, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. Ipomoea mollissima can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
